messageTemplate:
Hi {{name}} 👋😊

I'm so happy to share that I'm getting married! 💍❤️

It would truly make my day if you could join us and bless us on this special occasion.

Here's our wedding invitation:

🌐 {{websiteUrl}}

We are eagerly looking forward to celebrating this beautiful moment with you and your family.

See you at the wedding! ❤️
